description_long: This is an adult male figure with a muscular build, standing upright with arms slightly angled away from the body. The figure is bald and has defined facial features, a broad chest, and visible musculature on the torso, arms, and legs. He is wearing fitted, mid-thigh length shorts that appear to be made of a lightweight, flexible material. The skin tone is light, and the body proportions are realistic, with natural anatomical details such as collarbones, knees, and elbows clearly modeled. The feet are bare, and the hands are relaxed at the sides. There are no visible accessories, jewelry, or carried objects.
description: A bald adult male with a muscular build, standing upright and wearing fitted shorts. The figure is barefoot and has realistic anatomical details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the muscular chest, defined abs, facial features, and the fitted shorts.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, chest, abdomen, and the relaxed arm and leg posture.
description_view_2: Back view reveals the broad shoulders, muscular back, and the shorts' waistband.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head, torso, and limbs.
